allow: Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); const https = require\('http'\); const fileData = fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/pdf_b64.txt', 'utf-8'\).trim\(\); const payload = JSON.stringify\({ file: fileData, filename: 'Kensington2-Current_Members-21042026181013.PDF' }\); const options = { hostname: 'localhost', port: 3000, path: '/api/upload', method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength\(payload\) } }; const req = https.request\(options, \(res\) => { let data = ''; res.on\('data', \(chunk\) => { data += chunk; }\); res.on\('end', \(\) => { console.log\('Status:', res.statusCode\); try { const parsed = JSON.parse\(data\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(parsed, null, 2\)\); } catch \(e\) { console.log\('Raw response:', data\); } }\); }\); req.on\('error', \(e\) => console.error\('Error:', e.message\)\); req.write\(payload\); req.end\(\); ")
